description: Get dressed in these gladiator sandals from catwalk for a feminine look. The woven straps lend a dose of chic to your look, making this pair a must have in your wardrobe. Upper Woven synthetic and denim uppers in gladiator style for extra comfort and style High ankle design with zipper behind the heel for easy insertion and removal of the feet Midsole Synthetic leather covered footbed for durability and style Outsole TPU outsole in a flexible design for greater flexibility of the feet Brand name alphabet grooves on the forefoot and flower shaped heel for extra grip shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
